name: beef-cartel-monorepo
description: Beef Cartel — premium boxed-beef preorder app. npm-workspace monorepo: packages/design-system (the brand kit) + apps/web (Next.js on Firebase App Hosting).
//: apps/web is a standalone Next app (own lockfile, vendored design system) so Firebase App Hosting can build it; packages/* stays a workspace for the design-system preview + /design-sync.
